chapter_title.ar: باب فِي مَعْرِفَتِهِمْ أَوْلِيَاءَهُمْ وَ التَّفْوِيضِ إِلَيْهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 110 – Regarding their<sup>asws</sup> recognising their<sup>asws</sup> friends and the Authorisation to them<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (167/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (167/ 5)
text: رَجُلًا جَاءَ إِلَى أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) وَ هُوَ مَعَ أَصْحَابِهِ فَسَلَّمَ عَلَيْهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ أَنَا وَ اللَّهِ أُحِبُّكَ وَ أَتَوَلَّاكَ فَقَالَ لَهُ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) كَذَبْتَ قَالَ بَلَى وَ اللَّهِ إِنِّي أُحِبُّكَ وَ أَتَوَلَّاكَ فَكَرَّرَ ثَلَاثاً

فَقَالَ لَهُ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) كَذَبْتَ مَا أَنْتَ كَمَا قُلْتَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ خَلَقَ الْأَرْوَاحَ قَبْلَ الْأَبْدَانِ بِأَلْفَيْ عَامٍ ثُمَّ عَرَضَ عَلَيْنَا الْمُحِبَّ لَنَا فَوَ اللَّهِ مَا رَأَيْتُ رُوحَكَ فِيمَنْ عُرِضَ فَأَيْنَ كُنْتَ فَسَكَتَ الرَّجُلُ عِنْدَ ذَلِكَ وَ لَمْ يُرَاجِعْهُ .
وَ فِي رِوَايَةٍ أُخْرَى قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) كَانَ فِي النَّارِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Salih Bin Sahl,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>: ‘A man came over to Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup>, and he<sup>asws</sup> was with his<sup>asws</sup> companions. So he greeted upon him<sup>asws</sup>, then he said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘By Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, I Love you<sup>asws</sup> and acknowledge your<sup>asws</sup> Wilayah’. So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘You are lying!’ He said, ‘Yes, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, I do love you<sup>asws</sup> and acknowledge your<sup>asws</sup> Wilayah’. And he re-iterated thrice.

So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘You are lying! You are not as you are saying to be. Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Created the spirits before the bodies by two thousand years. Then He<sup>azwj</sup> Presented to us<sup>asws</sup> those who love us<sup>asws</sup>. So, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, I<sup>asws</sup> did not see your Spirit among the ones who were Presented. So where were you?’ So the man was silent during that and did not respond to him<sup>asws</sup>’.
And in another report, Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He was in the Fire’.
en.sarwar: In an other hadith it is said that abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) said, “He was in thefire.”
